player_drag.preview: dotted ballistic trajectory projected toward positive x
player_drag.release: fires one projectile and advances turn after impact or miss

enemy_turn.aim: toward player castle with bounded random error

damage_model.collision_rule: The castle hitbox shrinks to the currently visible remaining section.

end_state.cta: shown for both victory and defeat

verification_hooks.input_change_expected: Pointer drag/release increments inputs and changes phase or projectile count.
